description_long: This is a modern, stylized axe featuring a geometric, open-frame handle and a broad, angular blade. The upper section, including the blade, is a matte yellow color, while the lower handle transitions to a deep purple. The handle is constructed with triangular cutouts, reducing weight and giving it a contemporary, almost industrial appearance. The blade is thick and wedge-shaped, with a single cutting edge and a flat poll, suitable for both chopping and splitting tasks. The overall design suggests a lightweight yet sturdy tool, likely made from a composite or metal material with a synthetic grip. No visible branding or markings are present, and the object appears to be both functional and visually striking.
description: A modern axe with a yellow angular blade and a purple, open-frame handle featuring geometric cutouts. The design is lightweight, sturdy, and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the side, showing the full profile of the yellow blade and the purple handle with triangular cutouts.
description_view_1: A narrow edge-on view, revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with the same geometric handle and angular blade visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and color transition from yellow to purple.
attribute_handle_type: Open-frame, geometric handle with triangular cutouts, straight profile, likely plastic or composite, ergonomic grip, polygonal cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular, wedge-shaped blade with a single straight cutting edge and a flat poll, no beard, modern stylized geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite or molded integration of blade and handle, no visible traditional wedging or pinning.
